channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Big Picture: Super Bowl LX a Baptism By Fire For Drake Maye, Patriots
item.description: The Patriots may have been crushed in Super Bowl LX, but with Drake Maye and Mike Vrabel, they've got the ingredients for many more Super runs.

item.title: Men's College Basketball Rankings: Purdue, Kansas, UNC Moving Up in Top 25
item.description: FOX Sports' Casey Jacobsen shares his latest men's college hoops rankings with several big moves this week.

item.title: Klint Kubiak Confirms He Will Be the Las Vegas Raiders Next Head Coach
item.description: Klint Kubiak officially announced his plans to become the Las Vegas Raiders' next head coach.

item.title: Big Time Facts That Define Seahawks' Dominant Super Bowl LX Win Over Patriots
item.description: The Seahawks won Super Bowl LX in dominant fashion. Here are some facts and stats that define their victory over the Patriots.

item.title: Sound Smart: 3 Observations From Super Bowl LX
item.description: Breaking down the biggest talking points from the Seahawks' dominant win versus the Patriots in Super Bowl LX.

item.title: Maye: Had injection for ailing shoulder before loss
item.description: Patriots QB Drake Maye acknowledged he received a pain-killing injection for his injured right throwing shoulder before Sunday's loss, but maintained ...

item.title: 'Quad God,' U.S. defend figure skating team gold
item.description: Ilia Malinin beat Japanese rival Shun Sato in a head-to-head showdown at the Milan Cortina Olympics, helping the U.S. defend its team figure skating g...

item.title: Sources: 49ers not planning to trade QB Jones
item.description: The 49ers have no plans to trade quarterback Mac Jones this offseason and fully intend to bring him back as Brock Purdy's backup, sources told ESPN's ...

item.title: Transfer rumors, news: Man United want Tonali to replace Casemiro
item.description: Manchester United are showing an interest in Newcastle United midfielder Sandro Tonali. Transfer Talk has the latest.

item.title: Vonn has leg surgery after crashing at Olympics
item.description: Lindsey Vonn's bid to win the Winter Olympic downhill ended in a frightening crash that left her with a broken leg.
